data.title: Nacha's Top 50 ACH Originators and Receivers of 2025 Now Available; Total ACH Payment Volume in 2025 Exceeded 42 Billion
data.description: The latest Nacha Top 50 rankings for financial institution originators and receivers of ACH payments in 2025 have been released. The Top 50 originating institutions collectively processed 30.7 billion ACH payments last year, marking a 4.7% increase from the previous year. These institutions represented 91.4% of the ACH Network's total commercial payments volume. On the receiving end, the Top 50 institutions handled 23 billion ACH payments in 2025, reflecting a growth of 6.4% compared to 2024. These receiving institutions accounted for 65.1% of the total ACH payment volume.

data.title: Pollentia Unveils AI Co-Captain and Global Network at SXSW, Launching First Unified Vessel Intelligence Hub
data.description: In Austin, Texas, at the SXSW event, Pollentia introduced its revolutionary AI Co-Captain and Global Network. The platform is the inaugural unified vessel intelligence hub and lifecycle platform catering to consumer, commercial, and government vessels. It addresses marine fragmentation by integrating navigation, propulsion, onboard sensors, diagnostics, safety, and cybersecurity into a single self-managing core that enhances with each journey. Pollentia, the marine intelligence company, is spearheading this initiative to transform vessel operations.

data.title: Pega Blueprint Updates Make Vibe Coding Enterprise Ready
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Pegasystems Inc. (NASDAQ: PEGA) unveiled a cutting-edge feature in Pega Blueprint™, referred to as end-to-end vibe coding experience, aimed at facilitating rapid, conversational application design for large-scale enterprises. This new tool, available immediately, enables natural-language interaction throughout the design phase, empowering teams to expedite their processes while maintaining oversight. Through the Pega Blueprint vibe coding assistant, users gain the ability to engage in direct conversations with their app designs, thereby streamlining the development process.

data.title: Qventus Joins Oracle’s Partner Program
data.description: In San Francisco, Qventus, a prominent provider of care operations automation technology, revealed their recent participation in Oracle’s upgraded partner program. Oracle, collaborating with partners for over 40 years to boost collective customer triumph, has welcomed Qventus into the program. This initiative allows Qventus to build expertise in integrating Oracle solutions for automating operations in various care environments. The partnership aims to aid health systems in enhancing their efficiency and security measures.

data.title: WEBTOON Entertainment Elevates Yongsoo Kim to President to Accelerate Global Growth and Execution
data.description: In Los Angeles, WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. (Nasdaq: WBTN) revealed the appointment of Yongsoo Kim as President to oversee global operations and propel the company's growth phase. Previously serving as Chief Strategy Officer and Head of Global WEBTOON, Kim will prioritize fast-tracking execution and fostering innovation to revitalize growth across the global business. Additionally, Kim has been named a member of the Board of Directors at WEBTOON Entertainment. This development signifies an emphasis on revitalizing growth strategies led by Kim.

data.title: Algolia Introduces New Intelligent Auto Parts Solution
data.description: A tech company based in San Francisco, Algolia, has introduced a new platform called Intelligent Auto Parts Solution. This platform is powered by artificial intelligence (AI) and is designed for discovering automotive parts. It caters to both original equipment manufacturer (OEM) and aftermarket channels.

data.title: Restora Austin Joins Kalon Aesthetics, a National Network of Premier Plastic Surgery and Advanced Aesthetic Practices
data.description: Kalon Aesthetics, a renowned national plastic surgery and advanced aesthetics network, revealed a recent collaboration with Restora Austin, a leading plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine practice based in Austin, Texas. Restora Austin, well-regarded for its exceptional surgical results, innovative techniques, and patient-focused approach, aligns perfectly with Kalon Aesthetics' vision. This partnership signifies a significant expansion for Kalon Aesthetics in Texas, enhancing its position in one of the rapidly growing markets.

data.title: Dogecoin Jumps 15% In 2 Days: What Is Going On?
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) has been making significant strides with a price of $0.09586 and a market cap of $14.7 billion, marking a 3% increase. Meanwhile, Shiba Inu (SHIB) is priced at $0.055643 with a market cap of $3.3 billion, showing a 1.4% uptrend. In contrast, Pepe (PEPE) is at $0.053550 with a market cap of $1.5 billion, experiencing a 1.4% decline. Despite historically low social sentiment, Dogecoin is gaining traction, a trend often seen before a contrarian rally. Trader Tardigrade observed Dogecoin’s brief rally into Ichimoku cloud resistance, followed by a sharp rejection, indicating a short-term bearish outlook. This suggests Dogecoin attempted a bullish move but was swiftly pushed back. Currently, DOGE is finding support at the Kijun-sen. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tech Innovator Kerry W. Kirby to Discuss The Future of Multifamily Operating Models in an Autonomous World
data.description: Today, 365 Connect, a prominent player in the multifamily industry known for its AI-driven marketing and resident engagement solutions, revealed that CEO Kerry W. Kirby is set to join a live webinar discussing The Future of Multifamily. The event will take place on March 5, 2026.

data.title: In HelloNation, Snow Removal Experts David Mantz and David Mantz Jr. Examine Where to Get the Best Snow Equipment in Southington, Connecticut
data.description: In Southington, Connecticut on March 5, 2026, a guide was released on choosing a snow equipment dealer and getting vehicles ready for optimal winter function. For those seeking dependable snow equipment in Southington, Where can they turn to? HelloNation has shared detailed advice on selecting the right gear for winter conditions.

OIL SPIKE IS THE REAL RISK FOR U.S. ECONOMY, BOFA SAYS The conflict involving the U.S. and Iran hasn’t significantly changed the economic outlook, according to Bank of America. Analyst Meghan Swiber said risks to the U.S. economy remain limited unless oil prices surge sharply.

data.title: UK supermarket wins trademark dispute against Iceland; British grocery store can't trademark the name of the country.
data.description: Is it permissible for a company to trademark the name of a nation? In the instance of Iceland, the UK-based supermarket, the response is negative.
